name: Application Container Security Guide
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-190 (2017) covers container-platform security — host OS hardening, image vulnerability management, runtime security, orchestrator security, and supporting infrastructure. Foundational for Kubernetes-era security.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct container-security guidance. Heavily referenced in cloud-native security work.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to containerized AI inference services.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Published 2017-09. Now somewhat dated but still widely cited.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
